title: Player Props - Fix Injury Filtering & Ranking
description: Fix injury data parsing from tank01. Engine returns 'none' for OUT players (e.g. Tatum showed as active). Rebuild prop ranking with injury-aware logic.

spec.problem: Engine injury filtering returns 'none' for OUT players. Tatum showed as 'active' when he was OUT. Player prop rankings filtering incorrectly.
spec.expected: OUT players should be flagged and filtered. Injury impact penalty applied to projections. Prop ranking with injury-aware logic.
acceptance: OUT players correctly identified and filtered from props
GTD players have uncertainty penalty applied
Prop ranking shows injury context for each candidate
Tested against historical injury data - verification passes

steps: Fix injury data parsing from tank01 - check adapters/tank01.py injury field mapping
Apply injury impact penalty to prop projections
Rebuild prop ranking with injury-aware logic
Test against historical injuries to verify filter works
